hints: Complemento: la ropa en el probador
hintDisplay: Sujeto: yo / Verbo: probar (negación con not) / Complemento: la ropa en el probador / Conector: aunque / Tiempo: ayer
spanishSentence: Aunque había un descuento, no probé la ropa en el probador ayer
correctSentence: Although there was a discount, I did not try on the clothes in the fitting room yesterday.

hints: Complemento: el precio completo en la tienda

correctSentence: Although there was a discount, I did not pay the full price at the store.

hints: Complemento: los precios en diferentes tiendas

correctSentence: Although there is a discount, they cannot compare the prices in different stores.

correctSentence: Although there was a big discount, I did not buy clothes at the store yesterday.
